name: KULT — Arena Agent Creator
description: Instantly creates a fully-formed combat agent for the AI Arena: AI-generated personality traits, backstory, and a minted on-chain Living NFT (0G Chain, ERC-7857). Avatar art generates asynchronously and is not included in the initial response.

inputSchema.name: string (required)
inputSchema.idempotencyKey: string (required) — caller-supplied, guards against duplicate billing on retry

outputSchema.name: string
outputSchema.clan: string (always "OKX" for agents created through this service)

latency.typical: ~15s (fast path: personality generation only, avatar deferred async)
latency.note: avatarStatus in the response is "pending" until the async avatar pipeline completes; no callback/poll endpoint exists yet for avatar completion

status: endpoint implemented, payment integration in progress — see docs/okx/create-agent-endpoint.md
